html:
Exclusive to:

Gold Dust is a Resource introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It is obtained by mining artichoke shaped Boulders, using a Gold Pan at a Sparkling Pool, or mining Ruined Sculptures in the Ancient Pig Ruins. Six Gold Dust can be refined to a Gold Nugget. This recipe can be prototyped with a Science Machine.

If Gold Dust is dropped on the ground near a Pangolden, the Pangolden will eat it. After consuming three Gold Dust, the Pangolden will produce a Gold Nugget. This is more efficient than refining Gold Dust into Gold Nuggets, as it requires three instead of six Gold Dust.

Usage

×6

“Aw... it's hardly worth anything.”
–Wilson
“It's probably not worth much.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang like. Is shiny.”
–Wolfgang
“Death is not sparkly.”
–Wendy
“TINY POWDER OF MALLEABLE METAL”
–WX-78
“Small particles of the shiniest element.”
–Wickerbottom
“Look at all that gold!”
–Woodie
“I suppose any gold is good gold.”
–Maxwell
“Evidently, it's the preferred sustenance of those long nosed quadrupeds.”
–Wagstaff
“Gölden dust.”
–Wigfrid
“Wow! I wonder if it's worth anything.”
–Webber
“Fairy dust!”
–Walani
“Perhaps that nosey fellow would like to eat this.”
–Warly
“Aye! 'Tis treasure dust!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS DIRT O' SPARKLIES”
–Wilba
“Shiny dirt”
–Wormwood
“Hardly worth holding onto. If I could find more of it though...”
–Wheeler

If I could find more of it though... |choose=walani}} '''Gold Dust''' is a [[:Category:Resources|Resource]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is obtained by mining artichoke shaped [[Boulder]]s, using a [[Gold Pan]] at a [[Sparkling Pool]], or mining [[Ruined Sculptures]] in the [[Ancient Pig Ruins]]. Six Gold Dust can be refined to a [[Gold Nugget]]. This recipe can be prototyped with a [[Science Machine]]. If Gold Dust is dropped on the ground near a [[Pangolden]], the Pangolden will eat it. After consuming three Gold Dust, the Pangolden will produce a Gold Nugget. This is more efficient than refining Gold Dust into Gold Nuggets, as it requires three instead of six Gold Dust. =={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1=Gold Dust |count1=6 |result=Gold Nugget |tool=Science Machine}} {{clear}} Resources= {{Resources}} |-| Food= {{Food}} [[vi:Bụi Vàng]]
